sctypeahead.relatedcategories.showRelate.title: Show Related Categories For SKU
sctypeahead.relatedcategories.showRelate.description: Enabling this will show related categories associated with item SKU entered by user in search query.

sctypeahead.relatedcategories.showInstru.title: Show Instruction For All Related Categories/SubCategories
sctypeahead.relatedcategories.showInstru.description: Enabling this will show instruction against each of the related categories/subcategories.

sctypeahead.relatedcategories.showInstru.title: Show Instruction Only For Duplicated Related Categories/SubCategories
sctypeahead.relatedcategories.showInstru.description: Enabling this will show instruction against duplicated related categories/subcategories.
